espresso.$description: Espresso — primary ink on light grounds, structure, borders. Base brand espresso.

espresso-hero.$description: Espresso, hero variant — the specific darker background used behind the hero and any full dark section. Slightly deeper than base espresso, verified 15.8:1 contrast against parchment text.

parchment.$description: Parchment — light surface. Page base on light sections. Never pure white.

rust-logo.$description: Rust, logo variant — the dot and accents inside the HA mark SVG files only. Sampled directly from the original brand mark.

rust-screen.$description: Rust, screen variant — brightened for on-screen accents against the dark hero. CTAs, links, hover states, sliding arrow.

saddle.$description: Saddle Tan — decorative only. Dividers, card backgrounds. Verified 2.4:1 contrast on parchment, fails AA for text. Never used for type.

tannin.$description: Tannin Green — reserved. Certification or sustainability content only, used sparingly.

brass.$description: Brass — print and foil reference only. Never appears on screen, on any background, light or dark. Documented here so nobody re-derives it as a screen colour by accident.

cormorant-garamond.$description: Display and headline typeface, weight 600. Replaced Prata (which had replaced Fraunces). Generous ascenders and descenders, requires 1.18 line-height minimum in multi-line headings, verified against clipping on real glyph metrics.

urbanist.$description: Body, UI, navigation, wordmark. Weights 400 (body), 500, 600 (labels, buttons).

jetbrains-mono.$description: Specs, data, technical labels, grade tables, mono captions. Weight 400 only.

hero-h1.$description: Hero headline. The one place the word-mask entrance animation is used, per CLAUDE.md motion rules.

section-h2.$description: Section headings outside the hero. Plain fade-up entrance only, no word masking, that repetition was a diagnosed bug.

body.$description: Standard body copy. 45-75 characters per line is the target measure.

eyebrow.$description: Section labels above headings. Tracked wide, uppercase, mono only, never the display font.

data.$description: Grade tables, spec rows, on-request terms. Signals precision to a technical buyer.

md.$description: Rare filled elements, kept small deliberately, this brand does not use stadium pills

parchment-base.$description: Light section background: The Leathers, Terms

espresso-base.$description: Dark section background: Hero, Process, Enquiry

parchment-deep.$description: Alternate light surface for card contrast within light sections

ui.$description: Interaction feedback: hover, focus, button states

decorative.$description: Hero-only flourish ceiling, e.g. the word-mask reveal

com.hidesagent.provenance.note: Every value in this file traces to a decision made and tested in this project. Colours sampled from the original logo file. Contrast ratios verified with WCAG relative luminance, not assumed. This file replaces ad hoc inline CSS custom properties as the single source of truth for design values.
com.hidesagent.provenance.supersedes: inline :root blocks in earlier hero HTML files
